Rationale: Vendor document does not state measured efficiency.
Suggested_Action: Request a higher-efficiency UPS model, or ask the vendor to disable the eco-mode firmware profile and re-submit an FAT report at standard operating mode.

Rationale: Base offer ships as N; N+1 only available as a chargeable field upgrade.
Suggested_Action: Negotiate inclusion of the N+1 upgrade module into the base scope, or raise a commercial variation order before contract award.

Requirement_Text: Max compressor draw per fan unit
Rationale: Exceeds the 45.0 kW ceiling by 7.0 kW.
Suggested_Action: Specify a lower-power compressor variant, or request a derated fan configuration and re-test.

Rationale: Vendor manual does not address emissions compliance.
Suggested_Action: Request a CPCB-IV+ emissions test certificate from the vendor prior to technical sign-off.

Rationale: Vendor submittal does not confirm topology / Tier III compliance.
Suggested_Action: Request written confirmation of Tier III concurrently maintainable topology, or a third-party Tier certification letter, before technical approval.

Rationale: Vendor's rated range (0.0 C to 28.0 C) is wider than and conflicts with the client's tighter 20.0-24.0 C design point; site HVAC control is designed around the narrower client band, not the vendor's commercial rating.
Suggested_Action: Re-verify battery room HVAC design against the vendor's actual rated range, or request a battery model with a tolerance band matching 22C +/- 2C.

Rationale: Vendor manual is silent on supply air temperature capability.
Suggested_Action: Request written confirmation of achievable supply air temperature setpoint from the vendor before technical approval.

Rationale: Within tolerance of the 7.2 C design target.
